---
title: "Pilgrimage of the Ben Beriah: A Novel, The"
---

## Pilgrimage of the Ben Beriah: A Novel, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1897
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
